text:
is an of the Military Police Regiment stationed in the Stohess District.

Appearance

Dennis has medium-length messy brown hair and slight stubble. He also has tannish-colored eyes. He wears the standard Military Police uniform with a gray dress shirt underneath.

Personality

Dennis is a lazy, laid-back, high ranking Military Police officer. Like many of the soldiers outside the Scout Regiment, before and after the fall of Wall Maria, he would rather spend his time on the clock drinking and gambling. When given the opportunity he quickly shirks his duties onto those below him in rank.

Story

Wall Sina, Goodbye: Part Two

Due to an increase in trade of the coderoin drug in Wall Sina, Dennis informs the Military Police's new recruits of the rise in the drug's use.

Assault on Stohess arc

Dennis is initially put in charge of overseeing the mission to escort Eren Jaeger through the town, but hands the job over to Marlo Freudenberg so he can gamble, drink, and play cards instead.

After Annie Leonhart reveals herself as the Female Titan, he is seen among several other Military Police soldiers attempting to hurriedly put on their omni-directional mobility gear when Eren and Annie run by in Titan form.

He is later seen alongside Erwin and Nile following Annie's capture.

Trivia

Dennis and Jaeger share the same Japanese voice actor.
